LanguageData.ELIFUH-60Transport.label: UH-60 Blackhawk (Transport)
LanguageData.ELIFUH-60Transport.description: DESCRIPTION: The UH-60 is a helicopter designed for general medium to long range transport of goods and personnel. BASIC STATS: Health: 900 LOGISTICS POTENTIAL: Cargo Capacity: 1000kg Speed: 6 Passenger Capacity: 1-8 Fuel Per Tile: 8 Fuel Capacity: 720 Round Trip Range: 45 Full Range: 90 Internal Power: 900w ATTACK POTENTIAL: Bombing Run Capacity: n/a Precision Run Capacity: n/a Spread: n/a Distance between drops: n/a
